upstream_gap_reference.tool: local NumPy 2.4.3 C-vectorized timing, used because JAX is not installed in this environment

alien_recommendation_card.primitive: safe vectorized execution / autovectorization-friendly contiguous F64Bits loop
alien_recommendation_card.fallback: fall through to the generic Literal::as_f64 path for non-F64 tensors or malformed F64 tensors

lever.description: Bypass the generic Option + dtype-match path for well-formed DType::F64 tensors, using the same scalar f64 operation per element and revalidating shape count through TensorValue::new.

baseline.tool: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/(sin_64k_f64|exp_64k_f64)' --sample-size 30 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1

after.tool: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/(sin_64k_f64|exp_64k_f64)' --sample-size 30 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Output elements are produced in the same input order with one output per input.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Each output bit is generated by the same scalar f64 operation used by the generic path, then stored with to_bits.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: No comparisons or tie-breaking are introduced.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No RNG state is read or written.
isomorphism_proof.errors: Non-F64 tensors and malformed DType::F64 tensors fall through to the existing generic path; shape count is still checked by TensorValue::new.
